item.title: 1.1.0-beta.1
item.description:
## What's Changed
* docs(readme): ship translations for all 9 app languages ([`8a6ef76`](https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/commit/8a6ef767be63d4519a48280239df191d2c337119)) * fix(release): link commit hashes in fallback release notes ([`fdc6e90`](https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/commit/fdc6e9072a5938142f76ad367e414d8433263f3e))
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/compare/v1.1.0...v1.1.0-beta.1

## What's Changed
* fix(release): embed update notes as markdown, not HTML (`2d738ea`) * docs(readme): add shields.io badges, center header (`3daa2bf`) * feat: support macOS 14+ and Intel Macs via per-arch builds (`4f28942`)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/compare/v1.0.2...v1.1.0
